rationale.R1.1: Identifies the main concept and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (stiff and non-stiff regimes).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no mention of implementation details).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
